isi.driveFileNames: Jo Sang Jae - Say that you're mine.mp3
isi.lyrics:
Lyric Jo Sang Jae - Say that you're mine

Romanization

don’t worry baby
my love for you will last all night
believe me baby
your beauty will always be so right
everyday gonna be special now
anytime wanna see me than girl
I’ll be by your side

there ain’t nothing to make me
take you for granted and you’ll see my
shing two eyes never think twice and follow you around

I’ll overelook and ignore and
forget and hold you with my hands your~
tiny little lies never think twice and follow you around

seems like I’ve took my time
to find a girl for my end of time
I ask too much for you ain’t many somehow
just say that you’re mine. that will suffice

ain’t it easy when you think of it
just take a minute and find what we love in it
all the moments just stuck in our memories
all the time just felt so right (every time)
ain’t it always you and me in there
same for you right it will always be me and our past
about time to fall into this
on your mark set go let’s glide to eternity

seems like I’ve took my time
to find a girl for my end of time
I ask too much for you ain’t many somehow
just say that you’re mine. that will suffice

about time to fall into this
on your mark set go let’s glide to eternity

seems like I’ve took my time
to find a girl for my end of time
I ask too much for you ain’t many somehow
just say that you’re mine. that will suffice

Lyric Lee Hyang U - 세모 네모 동그라미 하트 (Love Shapes)

Romanization

i apeumi dahadorok
geureoge areumdaun geoseun

gyeolguk apaya handamyeon
saranghaneun nugunggawa

annyeong? nega nemoguna?

Hangeul

언젠가 둥그러질까
이 아픔이 다하도록
그렇게 아름다운 것은
결국 날카로움이 빚어내던데
결국 아파야 한다면
사랑하는 누군가와
사랑하는 너와

안녕? 네가 네모구나?
난 세모라고 해
빚어지고 싶어 아름답게
만들어줄래 동그랗게
부딪치자 많이 너와 견뎌
사랑해 빚어지고 싶어
아름답게

우우 -
우리의 시간이 다해도
해결 안 될 모남이 있다면
덜 깎인 모습도 인정하자
그리고 사랑이 되자

난 네모라고 해
사랑해 빚어지고 싶어

우우 -
우리의 시간이 다해도
해결 안 될 모남이 있다면
덜 깎인 모습도 인정하자
그리고 사랑이 되자

우우 -
세월이 흐르고 흘러도
해결 안 될 모남이 있다면
뾰족한 모양도 인정하자
그리고 하트가 되자

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Brad - SMOKES LOUD (feat. YOUHA)

Romanization

﻿She is young, a catalystic pain in her soul
Her body can't control


Babe‘s a song
I sing her when the crowd is tired
It goes like oh


And I'm like


Why you scared of night?
I just wanna move you right
Only talk with heavy liquor


No


Determine what you'd say
Every word is gonna stay
She told me I should let her go


Right


She smokes loud
Said she’s never caught up in it


Smokes loud
I needed to hear you babe
Smokes loud
And now she lives a minute


Smokes loud
It only matters when you’re naked


Devastated, she’s medicated
Know she can’t revoke
Gettin faded, oh no


Baby wanna hit that on the low


I’ll be famous, and I’ll detain us
Just to save your soul
Every sin is your lust


Oh no


I’m drowning in the haze
I can’t face the daylight
Cause the truth don’t ever feel right


Don’t you know,
I keep on running to the fire
Even though it burns me higher


So I’m lost inside the night
I’m addicted to your lies


I’m faded, I can’t fake it baby
I’ve been sinking underneath the pain
You makes me wanna hide


Every word is gonna stay
Only talk with heavy liquor


Right Gettin faded

isi.lyrics:
Lyric JIYUN - Love Around

Romanization

Light the darkness skies
Gather around, share the heart
You see that’s the golden life
Living with love, out with pain

How would you like to dive with me
Swirling under the blue
How would you like to catch the light
Bouncing dream as you can

Bright the shining star
Begin to fly, spread the hope
Don’t worry, nothing can go wrong
Always around on your side

Light the darkness skies
Gather around, share the heart
You see that’s the golden life
Living with love, out with pain

How would you like to dive with me
Swirling under the blue
How would you like to catch the light 
Bouncing dream as you can

Bright the shining star
Begin to fly, spread the hope
Don’t worry, nothing can go wrong
Always around on your side

Love me like i love you, like we do

Love me like i love

Love me like i love you
Love me like i love you, like we do
Love me like i love you

isi.lyrics:
Lyric JIYUN - Together

Romanization

Seeing through the window
Rivers and the trees
Watching the moonlight
Shooting star begins

I can’t imagine how grateful to be
Over and over and over with you

Wherever in the universe
Around the earth
Always be ready to stay

Heaven to stardust
Does not stop me, too
Skylit and sparkle
Shine behind us

I just can’t wait to be thrilled with you
Over and over and over with you

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Ahn Sol Hee - 너를 처음 본 순간 (The moment I saw you for the first time)

Romanization

budeureoun haetsari nareul gadeuk chaeugo neowa eoneusae achimeul majihae
ne gyeote itgo sipeun mam ireon ge sarangin geolkka salmyeosi nal anajwo

You ouou and you ouou jigeum uri moseubi
jogeumssik dagawa eoseo nege malhaejulge nae mam han georeumssik dagagal geoya

neoreul cheoeum bon sunggan naneun ummyeongirago mideotdeon geoya
jigeumbuteo sijakhae bolkka neol saranghago itdago nege malhaejugo sipeun geol

gidarideon sarangi naege on geoya neoui jeombuigo sipeo
nae nuneneun neoman

neoreul cheoeum bon sunggan naneun ummyeongirago mideotdeon geoya
jigeumbuteo sijakhae bolkka neol saranghago itdago nege malhaejugo sipeun geol

gateun sigan sok hamkkeigo sipeo pogeunhan ne pume anggyeo swigo sipeo
ipgaen misoman beonjigo sumgil su eopsi nega joa

neoreul cheoeum bon sunggan naneun ummyeongirago mideotdeon geoya
jigeumbuteo sijakhae bolkka neol saranghago itdago nege malhaejugo sipeun geol

Hangeul

부드러운 햇살이 나를 가득 채우고 너와 어느새 아침을 맞이해
네 곁에 있고 싶은 맘 이런 게 사랑인 걸까 살며시 날 안아줘

You ouou and you ouou 지금 우리 모습이
조금씩 다가와 어서 네게 말해줄게 내 맘 한 걸음씩 다가갈 거야

너를 처음 본 순간 나는 운명이라고 믿었던 거야
지금부터 시작해 볼까 널 사랑하고 있다고 네게 말해주고 싶은 걸

기다리던 사랑이 내게 온 거야 너의 전부이고 싶어
내 눈에는 너만

너를 처음 본 순간 나는 운명이라고 믿었던 거야
지금부터 시작해 볼까 널 사랑하고 있다고 네게 말해주고 싶은 걸

같은 시간 속 함께이고 싶어 포근한 네 품에 안겨 쉬고 싶어
입가엔 미소만 번지고 숨길 수 없이 네가 좋아

너를 처음 본 순간 나는 운명이라고 믿었던 거야
지금부터 시작해 볼까 널 사랑하고 있다고 네게 말해주고 싶은 걸
